---
title: "Yuvraj Rathod"
subtitle: "B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence at IIT Gandhinagar"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-shell}
::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
<div class="eyebrow">Personal website</div>

# Building with AI, systems, and practical software.

I'm Yuvraj Rathod, an AI undergraduate at IIT Gandhinagar. This site collects my profile, projects, and public code in one place.

<div class="button-row">
[GitHub](/github/){.btn .btn-primary}
[Projects](/projects/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
</div>
:::

::: {.hero-panel}
<div class="panel-chip">Currently focused on</div>
<div class="panel-title">AI, product-minded development, and clean interfaces</div>
<div class="panel-copy">I like work that is useful, legible, and easy to maintain. The goal here is a small site with a clear route to each part of my work.</div>

<div class="stat-grid">
  <div class="stat-card">
    <span class="stat-label">Role</span>
    <span class="stat-value">Student builder</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <span class="stat-label">Location</span>
    <span class="stat-value">IIT Gandhinagar</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <span class="stat-label">Public code</span>
    <span class="stat-value">yuvraj-rathod-1202</span>
  </div>
</div>
:::
:::

<div class="section-heading">Quick links</div>
<div class="link-grid">
<a class="content-card link-card" href="/github/">
  <span class="link-card-title">GitHub</span>
  <span class="link-card-copy">Open-source work, experiments, and the places where I keep shipping code.</span>
</a>

<a class="content-card link-card" href="/projects/">
  <span class="link-card-title">Projects</span>
  <span class="link-card-copy">A compact list of things I've built, with room for future case studies.</span>
</a>
</div>
:::
